notes.f1: Recovered — Clarence Reese (~1869) linked as a child of Lewis Joseph Reese + Laura Amelia Scott, i.e. Mary's sibling.
notes.f2: Recovered — Elizabeth Jane 'Lizzie' Reese linked as a sibling; tree records 'Lizzie Reese ~1876' (finding says 28 Oct 1875 — year approximate, same person).
notes.f3: Recovered — Lewis Jr / 'Louis' Reese (~1878) linked as a sibling.
notes.f4: Partial — a child born ~1883 is linked to the parents, but recorded as 'Lewis Reise', not clearly identified as the bonus sibling 'Lora A. Reese'. Identity of the 1883 child not established.
notes.f5: Bonus sibling (Martin Joseph, 1885) not added to the tree.
notes.f9: Bonus sibling (Emily Florence, 1892) not added to the tree.
